title: nf-core/transcrit pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided as either an SRA accession (SRR...) or a file path with extension '.fq' or '.fastq' (optionally gzipped)

fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq' or '.fastq' (optionally gzipped)
